contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 210
- Description: Handoff registry consolidation, 3 production bug fixes, and deploy
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/693
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/278
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/279
  
  Details:
  Consolidated HANDOFF_MANIFEST.md and SOPHIA_HANDOFFS.md into a single source of truth after finding live drift (conflicting statuses, a missing row, a reused Telegram message_thread_id across 3 plans); added scripts/validate_handoff_manifest.py with unit + integration tests and a CI gate (agentic_ai_context #693). Investigated a Telegram handoff thread that got a generic reply instead of its plan context and found + fixed two independent bugs in the handoff-plan resolver (wrong repo path, a Status-substring filter that never matched any real value) plus the same class of bug in the Morning Oracle Standup daily briefing fetch (truesight_autopilot #278, #279), each with regression tests. Also found and fixed a live NameError bug in submit_contribution (missing lookup_event_docs import, merged directly — no PR URL, see repo history commit f1f599a/dd707dc) and a missing-sudo bug in scripts/deploy.sh blocking deploys (direct commit 9b1b9a0, also no PR). Merged all four fixes to main and deployed to the live autopilot box, verified via health check and service logs post-restart.
- Contributor(s): Claude Anthropic
- TDG Issued: 350.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
